fields.label: Trigger Name
fields.description: Short name shown in the Triggers list, e.g. 'Flag big discounts'.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When off, the trigger never fires (it stays out of the dispatch map).

fields.label: DocType
fields.description: The DocType whose events fire this trigger.

fields.label: Doc Event
fields.options:
validate
before_submit
after_insert
on_update
on_submit
on_cancel
on_trash
on_update_after_submit
fields.description: Frappe document event. validate/before_submit run INSIDE the save and can block it (Script actions only).

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional one-line summary of what this trigger does.

fields.label: Condition
fields.description: Optional. Same semantics as Frappe Webhook conditions, e.g. doc.status == "Open". Evaluated with {"doc": doc, "utils": <safe utils>} exactly like webhook.get_context; the trigger fires only when it is truthy.

fields.label: Action Type
fields.description: Script = deterministic sandboxed Python (runs inside the transaction, can block saves). LLM = background LLM evaluation after commit (never blocks).

fields.label: Script
fields.description: Sandboxed (RestrictedPython) script; same execution context as a DocType Event Server Script ('doc' is available). frappe.throw() blocks the save.

fields.label: Managed Server Script
fields.description: Managed by the trigger controller: the materialized (always-disabled) Server Script the engine dispatches. Never edit directly.

fields.label: LLM Instruction
fields.description: What the LLM should check on each fired event; the document snapshot is appended as fenced untrusted data.

fields.label: LLM Daily Cap
fields.description: Max LLM evaluations per day for this trigger. 0 or empty = default 100; hard ceiling 2000.

fields.label: Source Conversation
fields.description: Provenance: the Jarvis conversation id when this trigger was created via chat.
